requirement.statement: Roadmap-first loop: ROADMAP.xml phases, STATE.xml next-action, TASK-REGISTRY.xml tasks stay the machine source of truth.
Host embeds default read-only; server writes to git require explicit operator policy and env flags.
Pack mode and Live mode must never be confused — labels, data source, and export paths are explicit.
Parsing for XML planning files is shared between CLI (planning-parse-core) and hosts so UI and snapshot agree on structure.
Snapshot and cockpit prioritize structured steering (phases, tasks, risks) over raw document dumps.
AGENTS.md remains the human playbook; the cockpit shows a compact reminder and deep link, not a full inline paste.
Static demos may ship a JSON pack (virtual paths + file contents) parsed in-browser for roadmap/state/tasks — no fake rows that are not in XML.
